name: South Jersey Industries, Inc.
description: South Jersey Industries, Inc. (SJI) is an energy services holding company based in New Jersey that provides safe, reliable, and affordable energy solutions. Through its primary subsidiaries, including South Jersey Gas and Elizabethtown Gas, the company serves over 700,000 natural gas customers. SJI is committed to delivering exceptional customer service while actively investing in renewable and sustainable energy assets. The company prioritizes safety, community engagement, and diversity, while pursuing innovative technologies to advance its decarbonization efforts and support a cleaner energy future for the communities it serves.
